case_title: TSURKAN, VASILY VS KOU, NOEL E.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSURKAN, VASILY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOU, NOEL E. $2,485.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-19-2007, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT KOU, NOEL E.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,938.52 FILED BY TSURKAN, VASILY AS TO DEFENDANT KOU, NOEL E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-02-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-01-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCES COURT WILL CONTINUE FOR 6 MONTHS UNTIL 18 MONTHS HAS LASPED/IF NO APPEARANCES AFTER 3 CONTINUED DATES, CASE DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLEMENT PENDING.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KOU, NOEL E. HEARING SET FOR APR-19-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE ON OEX FILED DURING THE OEX HEARING. COMPUTER WILL NOT ACCEPT BECAUSE FILED LESS THAN 3 DAYS BEFORE HEARING DATE.
PER PARTIES AGREEMENT, DEFT TO PAY $250 PER MONTH STARTING 5/15/07 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH TILL PAID IN FULL.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOU, NOEL E.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-01-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-29-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR TRIAL. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT NOT COMPLETED.
